response.overview: In an apartment building, a variety of residents live side by side. Behind each door lies a personal secret. Some darker, some stranger than they first appear. Outwardly cheerful Joosep, dreamy Pille-Riin, withdrawn Ott, and nosy Magda – each harbors an inner world that slowly begins to seep through the wallpaper and walls. As the residents struggle to keep their secrets hidden, cracks begin to spread through the building’s facade. Soon, all their secrets threaten to come to light.
response.title: Façade
